chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْجَبْرِ وَ الْقَدَرِ وَ الْأَمْرِ بَيْنَ الْأَمْرَيْنِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 30 – The Compulsion, and the Pre-determination, and the matter is between the two matters

text: اللَّهُ أَكْرَمُ مِنْ أَنْ يُكَلِّفَ النَّاسَ مَا لَا يُطِيقُونَ وَ اللَّهُ أَعَزُّ مِنْ أَنْ يَكُونَ فِي سُلْطَانِهِ مَا لَا يُرِيدُ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Al Barqy, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Hisham Bin Salim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> is more Benevolent than for Him<sup>azwj</sup> to Encumber the people what they are not enduring; and Allah<sup>azwj</sup> is Mightier than that there would happen to be in His<sup>azwj</sup> Authority what He<sup>azwj</sup> does not want’.
